source.description: Curated public facts from the Curriculum Vitae dated January 24, 2026 and the linked Google Scholar profile.

current_positions.title: Associate Professor
current_positions.organization: Seoul National University Bundang Hospital, Department of Neuropsychiatry

research_expertise: psychiatric genetics and genome-wide association studies
population health, environmental exposures, suicide, and dementia
public_research_program_summary: The research program investigates the etiology, biomarkers, treatment response, and population burden of neuropsychiatric disorders by integrating genetic, clinical, observational, imaging, environmental, and public-health data.

cohort_and_data_resources.deep_phenotyping: Approximately 2,000 psychiatric patients with deep phenotyping are described in the CV.
cohort_and_data_resources.genotyping: The CV describes genotyping data for more than 1,300 patients and 5,000 control subjects.
cohort_and_data_resources.cohort_program: Korean Mood Disorder Genetic Study - Depression (KOMOGEN-D) and related hospital-based precision-medicine cohort development.
cohort_and_data_resources.privacy_note: No patient-level records, protected health information, or confidential clinical data are published in this resource.

public_boundaries: This resource is a scholarly and professional profile, not medical advice.
It must not be used to identify, diagnose, or treat an individual patient.
Research findings should be interpreted from the original peer-reviewed publication.
